race.comment: WOLFMAN (8) made considerable ground in the run home to finish third last start over 1435m at this track. Should run very well. KINGS SICARIO (4) ran a better race last start to finish a close third over 1600m at this track. Has his share of talent. Hard to beat in this suitable race. LAUTRE (1) showed little early speed then came with a powerful run to finish third last time out over 1435m at this track. Sound record at this distance with two wins and six minor placings from 11 runs and is right in the mix. DO IT RIGHT (7) was returning from a break last time out and proved too classy, scoring by a nose over 1600m at this track. Will be better for that latest run and must be included. STAR TESTYMONY (3) can play a leading role first-up.
